subparts.text: “Any system needs certain prerequisites to function smoothly.” Discuss the statement with respect PMS. CO 1

What is meant by the concept of ‘total reward’? What should a reward system seek to do? CO 2
What are the differences between coaching and mentoring? CO 2
Explain the performance management cycle/process using an organization-based example. CO 1

Write a short note on competency-based PMS and e-PMS. CO 1
What are the critical dimensions of EVP, and how Tesco Business Services addressed it? CO 2
How and why might taking a more personalized approach to reward management help to improve both strategic alignment and psychological engagement? CO 2
What are the main difference in employee benefits between United States, South Korea and India. CO 2
